description: Resolve asset intents, select real UE assets or analytic proxies, and bind them into runtime scene actors with physics-critical metadata.
physical_assumptions: Asset retrieval is separate from physics verification but must preserve physics-critical properties.
Visual-only assets can be randomized or proxied without changing the physics graph.
Physics-critical asset fallback must be explicit and recorded.
Runtime actor creation must use the selected asset, collider, material, transform, and collision profile.
required_assets: UE package paths or analytic proxy definitions
verifier_rules: Every physics-critical object has a selected asset or explicit proxy fallback.
Selected asset includes collider and material metadata.
Runtime actor bindings reference known object ids.
Visual-only assets are excluded from the physics graph.
repair_suggestions: Update `SIM_STUDIO_ASSET_REGISTRY` or import an ADP asset index.
Use analytic proxy only when real asset metadata is unavailable.
